message: Call the Main Number 417-866-0001 and
ask for the Help Desk.
They have all the sortware to assist
with GeoTab and Camera related issues
We do not have access in Road Assist.

issue: Sending Pictures over the Prime App
message: How to send pics on the Prime App
From the HOME screen of your Prime App
In the upper left corner, click the 3
lines. RIGHT ABOVE the 'Report Claim'
is a ROAD ASSIST link. Be sure you
fill in every line that you are able
so we have all the info to assist. If
you have saved pictures, click the
button in the lower left corner
If you do any repairs yourself, I
will need a BEFORE and AFTER picture
sent to Road Assist. If you have to
purchase any parts, please get me an
ITEMIZED receipt as well. I am not
able to make an adjustment without
them. Once we have all the pics and
documents, we will do an adjustment
and it will be added to your
settlement.
When you are down at a dealer, the
first 24 hours are not covered. The
next 24, until the day of pickup are.
You must make it the full 24 hours, to
the minute, for a day to count for
downtime. It is paid at 275 a day for
solo and 400 for team.
It will be added to your settlement.
The alerts come in automatically from
the trailer. We are not able to stop
them from coming in to you. If we stop
this particular alert for your
trailer, it would stop it for ALL
trailers in the fleet and they may
have an issue that is NOT a false
alert. I am sorry for the
inconvenience and please do check it
when you stop for any new issues.

issue: How to fill out an Accident Report
message: **ACCI REPORT NEEDED**
From the HOME screen of your Prime App
In the upper Left corner, click the 3
lines. Look for Report Accident
Fill in every line that you are able
so we have all the info to assist.
Please send in the pictures of the
damage and safety will ask you to call
when they are ready for you to do so.
I never know if something is covered
until we get guidance from the shop.
We need to know the Primary Failure.
Once they know what failed and why,
they can better determine if it is
going to be filed for warranty.
We will also double check when the
invoice and estimates arrive.
We also have on-site reps from the
dealer to assist us better.

issue: I am locked out of my truck
message: I will not be able to set up service
for a lockout. You will need to call,
set up and pay for this service. I
would start with 1-800-POP-A-LOCK.
They are a nationwide locksmith. If
they do not service the area, you can
Google Locksmiths and or Tow
companies to assist. Your dispatcher
can advance you the funds for the
lockout to pay them.
